member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Spreadsheet.SingleWorkbookRepository
member.summary: Repository for single-document analysis scenarios. Wraps an existing Workbook instance and does not support document creation.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Spreadsheet.SingleWorkbookRepository.#ctor(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.Workbook,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance wrapping an existing workbook.
member.param: Optional display name for the document.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Spreadsheet.SpreadProcessingAgentToolsBase
member.summary: Base class for spreadsheet agent tools that provides workbook access via a repository.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Spreadsheet.SpreadProcessingAgentToolsBase.#ctor(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.IWorkbookRepository)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the specified workbook repository.
member.param: The workbook repository for document access.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Spreadsheet.SpreadProcessingFileManagementAgentTools
member.summary: Provides document lifecycle management tools for creating, listing, and exporting workbooks.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Spreadsheet.SpreadProcessingFormulaAgentTools
member.summary: Provides formula and calculation agent tools for spreadsheets. These tools allow formula evaluation and discovery without modifying the document.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Spreadsheet.SpreadProcessingReadAgentTools
member.summary: Provides read-only agent tools for querying and analyzing spreadsheet data without modification. These tools are safe for analysis-only scenarios.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Spreadsheet.SpreadProcessingWorksheetAgentTools
member.summary: Provides worksheet management agent tools for creating, deleting, and organizing worksheets. These tools modify the workbook structure but not cell content.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Spreadsheet.SpreadProcessingWriteAgentTools
member.summary: Provides document editing agent tools for writing data, applying styles, and formatting spreadsheets. These tools modify cell content and formatting in the workbook.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Spreadsheet.SpreadProcessingAnalysisAgentTools
member.summary: Provides high-level data analysis tools for spreadsheets using Split-Apply-Combine operations. These tools enable filtering, grouping, and aggregation without requiring formula knowledge.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Spreadsheet.SpreadProcessingAnalysisAgentTools.#ctor(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.IWorkbookRepository)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the specified workbook repository.
member.param: The workbook repository for document access.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Spreadsheet.SpreadProcessingAnalysisAgentTools.DescribeData(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets worksheet structure and column information in a single call.
Aggregates data with optional filtering and grouping.
